description_long: This cake is shaped to resemble a rustic log or tree stump, with a textured brown exterior mimicking bark and a dusting of white powder that suggests snow or powdered sugar. The top surface is flat and lightly dusted, with two upright cylindrical decorations resembling small tree branches or stumps protruding from the log. Green leaf-like decorations are scattered around the base and sides, adding a natural, woodland touch. The cake sits on a square, dark-colored board that contrasts with the lighter cake and decorations. The overall appearance is whimsical and evokes a woodland or winter forest scene.
description: A log-shaped cake with brown bark-like texture, white powdered dusting, and green leaf decorations, displayed on a dark square board.
description_view_0: The front view shows the flat top of the log cake with two upright branch-like decorations and several green leaves at the base.
description_view_1: This side view highlights the rounded end of the log, a single upright branch, and green leaves clustered at the base.
description_view_2: The back view displays the long side of the log, a single upright branch, and a prominent green leaf at the base.
description_view_3: This side view shows the opposite rounded end, both upright branches, and green leaves at the base and side.
